title: AuditRecordDigest
description: Protocol-owned canonical digest contract for signed audit records. Audit record identity is sha256 over RFC 8785 JCS canonical bytes of the full SignedObjectEnvelope.

auditRecordDigestValue.description: Reusable digest fragment for signed audit-record identity. Value is sha256(JCS(SignedObjectEnvelope)).

hash_alg.description: Pinned hash algorithm for audit-record identity digests.

hash.description: Lowercase hexadecimal digest value for the canonical signed audit envelope bytes.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for audit-record digests.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this audit-record digest object.

hash_alg.description: Hash algorithm identifier for this audit-record digest object.

hash.description: Lowercase hexadecimal digest value for sha256(JCS(SignedObjectEnvelope)).
